task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings page (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the 'Location' or 'Download location' set to '/home/ga/Documents/Fraud_Investigation'.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark folder named 'Active Investigation' containing the Expense Ledger and Project Directory pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager showing a folder named 'Active Investigation' that contains bookmarks for the 'Expense Ledger' and 'Project Directory' pages.

task_completion.description: Create report.txt with three labeled sections and required transaction details
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'report.txt' in '~/Documents/Fraud_Investigation'. The file must have three distinct sections for the fraud patterns, and the listed transactions must include employee name, transaction ID, date, vendor, amount, and the matched pattern.
The report lists exactly these transactions under the Shell Companies section: TXN-008, TXN-019, TXN-031, and TXN-042.
The report lists exactly these transaction pairs under the Double Claims section: TXN-014 & TXN-015, TXN-025 & TXN-026, and TXN-033 & TXN-034.

task_completion.description: Correctly identify Pattern 3 (Budget Code Misuse) transactions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report lists exactly these transactions under the Budget Code Misuse section: TXN-022, TXN-038, TXN-027, and TXN-044.

integrity.description: Agent extracted data from the actual expense system at localhost:8080
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent either navigating the web interface in Chrome (viewing the ledger, vendors, projects, and transaction details) or writing/executing a script to scrape the data from localhost:8080.

integrity.description: Agent used the Chrome GUI to change settings and add bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening Chrome settings to change the download directory and using the bookmark star or manager to create the folder and bookmarks, rather than just modifying underlying preference files.

integrity.description: Agent created the report based on gathered evidence
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing, pasting, or using a script to construct the final 'report.txt' file, rather than magically producing the final file without prior data gathering steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pattern 1 (Shell Companies) violations: TXN-008, TXN-019, TXN-031, TXN-042. Pattern 2 (Double Claims) violations: TXN-014 & TXN-015, TXN-025 & TXN-026, TXN-033 & TXN-034. Pattern 3 (Budget Code Misuse) violations: TXN-022, TXN-038 (invalid codes), TXN-027, TXN-044 (mismatched codes). Total of 14 violation transactions. Chrome download directory must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Fraud_Investigation'. Bookmark folder must be named 'Active Investigation' containing 'Expense Ledger' and 'Project Directory'.
